category_sources: Official SourceForge project says ReadyMedia, formerly MiniDLNA, is simple media server software compliant with DLNA/UPnP-AV clients.
source_facts.description says media server software compliant with DLNA/UPnP-AV clients.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project title is ReadyMedia and notes it was formerly known as MiniDLNA.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project exposes a Wiki and official website for ReadyMedia/MiniDLNA documentation.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge ReadyMedia project exposes a Git repository tab and browsable Git tree under /p/minidlna/git/.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge summary identifies DLNA/UPnP-AV media-server functionality and non-interactive daemon UI.
